name: Mexican Snack Squares
recipeInstructions:
From 1 and 1/4 ounce package.
~------------------------------------------------------
~--------------- Preheat oven to 375F. Unroll the dough into 4 long rectangles. Place crosswise in an ungreased 15x10x1 inch baking pan; press over bottom and 1 inch up the sides to form a crust. Firmly press perforations to seal. Bake at 375F for 14 to 19 minutes or until golden brown. Cool completely.
~ Spread beans over crust, leaving at least 1/2 inch from the edges. In a small bowl, combine sour cream and taco seasoning mix; stir well. Spread the sour cream mixture over the beans.
~ Sprinkle cheese, onions, green pepper, tomatoes, and olives evenly over the sour cream. Cover; refrigerate for 1 hour. Cut into squares. Serve with salsa.
